name: AggregationQuery
description: AggregationQuery schema from Palo Alto Networks SASE Aggregate Monitoring API

tsg_id.description: Tenant Service Group ID to scope the query. Data from all descendant TSGs within this scope is included.

filter.description: Key-value filter conditions to apply to the query. Filter keys are data-type specific (e.g., severity, category, app_name).

end.description: Query end time (ISO 8601). Defaults to current time.

last.description: Relative time range shorthand (e.g., 1h, 24h, 7d, 30d). Mutually exclusive with start/end.

count.description: Maximum number of result rows to return.

histogram.description: Configuration for time-series histogram output. When specified, results are bucketed by time.

field.description: Timestamp field to use for bucketing.

group_by.description: Dimension fields to group results by. Supported values are data-type specific.
